title: Before vs After
subtitle: See exactly what changes when you apply Factory Pattern

scenarios.title: Object Creation — Scattered vs Centralized
scenarios.description: Every service creates notifications directly. Adding WhatsApp means touching ALL services.

before.label: Scattered Creation (5 services, same if-else)

after.label: Factory — One Place, One Change

scenarios.insight: 5 files → 1 file. The Factory absorbs ALL creation complexity.

scenarios.title: Constructor Coupling — Direct vs Decoupled
scenarios.description: Client knows every constructor signature. Constructor changes = cascade of breakage.

before.label: Direct Constructor Coupling

after.label: Factory Hides Constructor Details

scenarios.insight: Constructor details are an IMPLEMENTATION SECRET. Factory keeps that secret.

scenarios.title: Testing — Untestable vs Mockable
scenarios.description: Direct instantiation makes unit testing impossible. Factory enables mock injection.

before.label: Untestable — Hardcoded Dependencies

after.label: Testable — Factory + Interface Injection

scenarios.insight: Factory doesn't just organize creation — it makes your code TESTABLE.
